zh: 可是……中转站那么大，那么多快递，我们怎么找？
en: But… the sorting center is huge, there are so many packages. How are we supposed to find it?

zh: 只要有一丝希望，就不能放弃。
en: As long as there's even a shred of hope, we can't give up.

zh: 你忘了吗？我们连印刷厂的危机都一起挺过来了。这次也一定可以的。
en: Remember? We got through that printing press crisis together. We can get through this too.

zh: 走吧。我陪你一起去找。
en: Come on. I'll go with you to look for it.

zh: 实在抱歉安小姐，是我们的工作人员失误，把您的快递和另一个同名的快递搞混了。
en: I'm so sorry, Miss An. Our staff made a mistake and mixed up your package with another one that had the same name.

zh: 那个快递已经被送到城西的一个小区了。我们已经联系了收件人，但是她不在家，要晚上八点才能回来。
en: That package was already delivered to a residential complex in the west part of town. We contacted the recipient, but she's not home — she won't be back until 8 PM tonight.

zh: 晚上八点？那我们现在就过去等她！
en: Eight PM? Then let's go over there right now and wait for her!

zh: 别担心，很快就能等到了。
en: Don't worry. It'll be here before you know it.

zh: 林辰，如果这次找不回样衣，怎么办？
en: Lin Chen… what if we can't get the sample dress back?

zh: 不会的。一定能找回来的。
en: We will. I know we'll get it back.

zh: 就算真的找不回来，我们还有备用布料。大不了通宵一晚上，重新做一件。
en: And even if we really can't get it back, we still have backup fabric. We can just pull an all-nighter and make a new one.

zh: 可是……一晚上根本做不完。「星夜」的刺绣那么复杂。
en: But… there's no way we can finish it in one night. The embroidery on 'Starlight' is way too intricate.

zh: 没关系。我陪你一起做。我虽然不会做衣服，但我可以帮你钉珠子，剪线头。
en: That's okay. I'll help you. I don't know how to sew clothes, but I can sew on beads and snip threads.

zh: 只要我们一起努力，就没有做不到的事。
en: As long as we work together, there's nothing we can't do.

zh: 有你在，真好。
en: I'm so glad you're here.

zh: 太好了……太好了……
en: Thank god… thank god…

zh: 我就说吧，一定能找回来的。
en: See? I told you we'd find it.

zh: 幸好没有弄坏，不然我真的不知道该怎么办了。
en: Good thing it's not damaged. I don't know what I would've done if it was.

zh: 我来帮你钉珠子吧。你告诉我怎么弄。
en: Let me help with the beads. Just show me what to do.

zh: 好。你看，就是这样，把珠子穿在针上，然后缝在裙子上。
en: Okay. Look, it's like this — thread the bead onto the needle, then stitch it onto the dress.

zh: 没什么。就是觉得……能遇到你，真好。
en: It's nothing. I just think… I'm really lucky to have met you.

zh: 可是……「星夜」上面的刺绣光是我一个人就要一个月。
en: But… the embroidery on 'Starlight' alone would take me a whole month by myself.

zh: 那就一起做。你负责刺绣和版型，我负责钉珠子、剪线头、熨烫。我们两个人，一晚上顶半个月。
en: Then we'll do it together. You handle the embroidery and pattern work, I'll handle the beads, thread trimming, and ironing. The two of us can cover half a month's work in one night.

zh: ……你真的愿意陪我疯？
en: …You're actually willing to go along with this crazy plan?

zh: 你说呢？从漫展那天开始，我不一直都在陪你疯吗？
en: What do you think? Haven't I been going along with your crazy plans ever since that con day?

zh: ……也是。那开工吧。
en: …Fair point. Let's get to work, then.

zh: ……居然真的做完了。
en: …I can't believe we actually finished it.

zh: 我就说吧。
en: Told you.

zh: 从今以后，不管你要拍什么，我都给你当模特。
en: From now on, whatever you want to shoot — I'll be your model.

zh: 一言为定。
en: It's a deal.

zh: 终于搞定了！
en: We're finally done!

zh: 现在才五点，还有四个小时发布会才开始。我们可以休息一下。
en: It's only five o'clock. The launch show isn't for another four hours. We can rest a bit.

zh: 好啊。
en: Sounds good.

zh: 好美啊。
en: It's beautiful…

zh: 嗯。好久没有看过日出了。
en: Mm-hmm. It's been so long since I last watched the sunrise.

zh: 其实……我有话想对你说。
en: Actually… there's something I've been wanting to tell you.

zh: 我也有话想对你说。
en: There's something I want to tell you too.

zh: 安雅，我喜欢你。
en: Anya… I like you.

zh: 从第一次在漫展角落看到你的时候，我就注意到你了。
en: I noticed you from the very first moment I saw you in that corner of the convention.

zh: 后来和你一起工作，一起经历了那么多事，我越来越喜欢你。
en: And then working with you, going through so much together — I just fell for you more and more.

zh: 喜欢你的倔强，喜欢你的认真，喜欢你嘴硬心软的样子。
en: I love how stubborn you are, how dedicated you are. I love how you act all tough but you're really soft inside.

zh: 我想做你的男朋友，想一直陪在你身边，和你一起把「暗夜蔷薇」做下去。
en: I want to be your boyfriend. I want to stay by your side and build 'Dark Night Rose' together with you.

zh: 笨蛋！你怎么现在才说！
en: You idiot! What took you so long to say it!

zh: 我早就喜欢你了！从你帮我处理伤口的时候，从你陪我通宵赶宣传册的时候，从你送我萤火虫照片的时候……
en: I've liked you for so long! Since the time you helped me with my wound, since the time you stayed up all night helping me with the promo booklet, since you gave me that photo of the fireflies…

zh: 我一直在等你说这句话。
en: I've been waiting for you to say it.

zh: 对不起，让你等了这么久。
en: I'm sorry I made you wait so long.

zh: 林辰，我喜欢你。真的很喜欢你。
en: Lin Chen… I like you. I really, really like you.

zh: 我不知道从什么时候开始，我的眼里就只有你了。
en: I don't even know when it happened, but you're the only one I see now.

zh: 我想和你在一起，不只是工作伙伴。
en: I want to be with you. Not just as work partners.

zh: 我也喜欢你。但是……我有点害怕。
en: I like you too. But… I'm a little scared.

zh: 我从来没有谈过恋爱，我不知道怎么和别人相处。
en: I've never been in a relationship before. I don't know how to… be with someone like that.

zh: 而且，我的品牌才刚刚起步，未来还有很多不确定的事情。
en: And my brand is just getting started. There are so many uncertainties ahead.

zh: 没关系。我们可以慢慢来。
en: That's okay. We can take it slow.

zh: 不管未来有什么困难，我都会陪你一起面对。
en: No matter what difficulties come, I'll face them with you.

zh: 那……我们就试试吧。
en: Then… let's give it a try.

zh: 对不起，林辰。
en: I'm sorry, Lin Chen.

zh: 我……我一直把你当成最好的搭档和朋友。
en: I… I've always thought of you as my best partner and friend.

zh: 我从来没有想过别的事情。
en: I've never really thought about… anything more than that.

zh: 没关系。是我唐突了。
en: It's okay. I shouldn't have sprung that on you.

zh: 那我们……还是做朋友吧。
en: Then… let's just stay friends.

zh: 啊！已经八点了！我们该去发布会现场了！
en: Ah! It's already eight! We need to get to the venue!

zh: 好。走吧。
en: Right. Let's go.

zh: 今天的发布会，一定会成功的。
en: Today's show is going to be a success. I know it.

zh: 一定会的。
en: It will be.

zh: 你怎么才来？我还以为你要迟到了。
en: You're cutting it close. I thought you were going to be late.

zh: 怎么会迟到。你的专属摄影师，永远不会缺席。
en: Late? Never. Your personal photographer never misses a show.

zh: 哼，算你识相。
en: Hmph. Good that you know it.

zh: 安小姐，还有十分钟发布会就要开始了。
en: Miss An, the show starts in ten minutes.

zh: 好，我知道了。
en: Okay, I'm on it.
